title: [codereview] parse_data does not copy payload from stream_buf
description: In lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.c:771, info->payload = payload directly aliases the protobuf cursor into the stream_buf. This allows pointer to escape the documented validity window. Should memcpy to a stable buffer in packet_info. P3 but treat as real work per task. Tag: codereview
close_reason: Fixed: parse_data now copies payload into info->payload_buf preventing stream_buf exposure. Updated for large payloads. All codereview P3 fixed as real work.
